full_text:
Yang Huiyu 羊徽瑜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Huiyu (羊徽瑜)was born in Taishan in Nandong. Third wife of Sima Shi, noted for intelligence and good personality. Sought to gain rank for first wife. Yang Huiyu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Yang Huiyu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
